behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction.md explicitly names the required strings: RequireFrom(Box<ConstantString>), rel.as_str(), .parent().join(rel), JsValue::Url(rel, JsValueUrlKind::Relative), RequireFrom(Box::new(rel.clone())), createRequire('<path>'), module.html#modulecreaterequirefilename, all 6 test case names, input.mjs, and {entry_name}.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction.md dictates exact syntax: 'The exact syntax must be RequireFrom(Box<ConstantString>)', 'Use rel.as_str()', 'Chain .parent().join(rel)', 'Wrap the relative path in RequireFrom(Box::new(rel.clone()))' — this is prescriptive code, not a bug description.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert exact literal strings like 'RequireFrom(Box<ConstantString>)', 'rel.as_str()', 'RequireFrom(Box::new', 'rel.clone()', 'createRequire(''; an alternative valid fix using e.g. Arc<str>, different binding names, or different join idiom would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: All tests use _read() and assert substring presence in Rust source files (e.g., 'assert "RequireFrom" in src'); the task description acknowledges 'No Rust toolchain is available... Tests verify the source changes are correctly applied by parsing Rust source with Python.'

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require specific concrete strings like 'CjsRequireAssetReference::new', 'is very dynamic', 'is not statically analyze-able', and enabling 6 specific test cases — a stub cannot pass these.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All 6 numbered requirements in instruction.md (enum variant, handler, URL detection, Display, test cases, entry name) are covered by corresponding test functions.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments: 'Gates (pass_to_pass, static)', 'Fail-to-pass (pr_diff)', 'Pass-to-pass' with descriptive docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task modifies Rust source code, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: File paths, case names, and identifiers are consistent between instruction.md and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names exact files implicitly via exact syntax requirements and identifies 'references module', 'analyzer module', 'unit.rs' with required match-arm syntax, removing the localization challenge.
